title: MIXEL Pineapple Design And Squishy Texture Toy, Provide Both Stress Relief And Entertainment, Unique And Fun Sensory Toy, Long-Lasting Enjoyment, Gift Choice For Kids, (2PCS)
features: FUN & EYE-CATCHING PINEAPPLE DESIGN – This squishy toy is shaped like a vibrant pineapple, making it an adorable and playful stress-relief accessory for both kids and adults. Its bright colours and unique texture add to the fun, making it a great addition to any toy collection.

SOFT, SLOW-RISING FOAM TEXTURE – Made from good-quality slow-rising foam, this toy provides a deeply satisfying squish and bounce-back effect. It retains its shape even after repeated squeezing, offering long-lasting enjoyment and relaxation.

IDEAL FOR STRESS & ANXIETY RELIEF – Designed to reduce tension and promote relaxation, this squishy toy helps calm the mind, improve focus, and ease anxiety. It’s perfect for individuals who need a soothing sensory experience throughout the day.

LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE FOR ON-THE-GO USE – Its compact size makes it easy to carry in a pocket, purse, or backpack. Whether at school, work, or while traveling, this squishy toy provides a quick and effective way to relieve stress and stay entertained.

DURABLE, NON-TOXIC & SAFE FOR ALL AGES – Made from good-quality, non-toxic, and child-safe materials, this squishy toy ensures durability and long-term use. It is a fantastic gift choice for birthdays, Christmas, party favors, or as a fun fidget toy for everyday use.
description: Product description The MIXEL Pineapple Design Squishy Toy is a delightful and engaging sensory toy that combines stress relief and entertainment in a fun, tropical-inspired design. Crafted to resemble a bright and cheerful pineapple, this squishy toy is not only visually appealing but also provides a deeply satisfying soft, slow-rising texture that makes it irresistible to squeeze. Made from good-quality, slow-rising foam, it is designed to retain its shape even after repeated use, ensuring long-lasting enjoyment. Whether you need a stress-relief tool, a fidget aid, or simply something fun to squeeze, this toy offers the perfect tactile experience. The slow-rise effect provides a soothing sensation that helps to ease tension, making it an excellent choice for individuals dealing with anxiety, stress, or restlessness. The soft and squishy texture can also be beneficial for those who enjoy sensory stimulation, making it a great tool for children and adults alike. With its lightweight and compact size, this squishy toy easily fits into a pocket, purse, or backpack, making it ideal for use at home, school, work, or while traveling. No matter where you are, you can always have a quick way to unwind and enjoy a moment of relaxation. Safety Warning Warning:Toy inside. Adult supervision recommended
